properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v2 v3 v5 v3 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: From His glory, He came down God in flesh and bone, Set aside His royal crown For a lowly, dusty robe.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: If that doesn't sound like "I love you!" Then hear what Calvary has to say.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: The cross must have whispered And the spear must have shouted, The crown of thorns revealed what must be said Though "I love you!" wasn't spoken From the lips of the Savior He said, "I love you!" with three nails instead.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Every stripe upon His back Was mercy in disguise, Tears of sorrow pourin' out Was redemption in His eyes

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Have you ever felt unloved? Have you ever felt ashamed? Have you ever felt abandoned By the sin that bears your name?

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Though "I love you!" wasn't spoken From the lips of the Savior He said, "I love you!" with three nails instead.
